/* Iran's participation */ grammar. "Neither" didn't work here. "Neither been confirmed" leads the reader to expect another verb (e.g., "Neither been confirmed nor denied," in cagey bureaucrat-speak). There is only one verb—it hasn't been confirmed by either organization.
